title: Stakeholders celebrate launch of solar PV plant and microgrid
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"HARTENBOS NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality's Hartenbos Wastewater Treatment Solar Photovoltaic (PV) Plant and Microgrid was officially launched on Wednesday 5 November.","html":"HARTENBOS NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality's Hartenbos Wastewater Treatment Solar Photovoltaic (PV) Plant and Microgrid was officially launched on Wednesday 5 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Solareff served as the contractor for engineering design, procurement and construction, while Element Consulting Engineers were the electrical consultants on the project."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The project was started in April 2024 and is designed to ensure an uninterrupted power supply to the wastewater treatment facility, even during stage 6 load-shedding.","html":"The project was started in April 2024 and is designed to ensure an uninterrupted power supply to the wastewater treatment facility, even during stage 6 load-shedding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Under normal conditions, it operates in parallel with the Eskom grid; in the event of grid interruptions, the battery energy storage system takes over, supported by solar generation during daylight hours. Excess solar energy is fed into the municipal grid.","html":"Under normal conditions, it operates in parallel with the Eskom grid; in the event of grid interruptions, the battery energy storage system takes over, supported by solar generation during daylight hours. Excess solar energy is fed into the municipal grid."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The project was awarded as the top performing project at the Association of Municipal Electricity Utilities Awards.","html":"The project was awarded as the top performing project at the Association of Municipal Electricity Utilities Awards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Stakeholders celebrate launch of solar PV plant and microgrid
